gh_951802ace03a89fab8398ab1.title: Hiring: AI Team Lead (Remote, ScholarshipOwl)
gh_951802ace03a89fab8398ab1.description:
We’re looking for a hands-on and strategic **AI Team Lead** to drive growth of our AI/ML capabilities at [ScholarshipOwl](https://scholarshipowl.com/).

What You’ll Do

- Lead a small, high-impact ML team
- Architect & deploy ML solutions (LLMs, RAG, CV, Recommenders)
- Collaborate with product & engineering
- Own the AI roadmap

Requirements

- 2+ years ML engineering
- Experience with deep learning, ML pipelines, and production
- Hands-on with LLMs / RAG / CV / Recommenders
- Remote-first communication skills

Why Join

- Mission-driven (help students access education)
- Remote, unlimited PTO
- $200/month home office budget
- Small team, high impact

👉 Apply here: https://careers.scholarshipowl.com/o/ai-team-lead

**### 🔥 Calling all Back-end Heroes! We’re scaling up our team**

**Position**: Principal & Senior Back-end Engineer
**Location**: Hybrid or Remote
**Salary Range**: Up to 120,000,000 VND Gross

What we’re looking for

- 7+ years of solid hands-on experience building backend systems for web applications

- Strong background in system design, microservices, and distributed architectures

- Proficient in backend technologies (Java, Node.js, Go, or similar)

- Strong communication skills in English

**_📲 Interested? Reach out via Zalo: 0948876587 (Hương Thảo)_**
